card.name: Naau Gok Arcanist
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") {1}{W}, {T}: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Cong Baak Skymaw
card.text: Flying {1}, Exile a card from your graveyard: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sophomore Exorsister
card.text: Flash When this creature attacks or blocks for the first time, it gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Bloodwhip
card.text: This spell deals 6 damage to any nonplayer target. {3}{R}, Exile this card from your graveyard: It deals 2 damage to target player. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Glory Be To Your Radiant Scales
card.text: Up to one target creature gains deathtouch until end of turn. Beseech {4}{B} ({4}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Fangclaw Caller
card.text: When this creature enters, if you control an artifact and an enchantment, you may activate one of this creature's nonmana abilities without paying its cost. {2}{U}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Tsim Sha Gourmands
card.text: Deathtouch Once each turn, whenever you create a token, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Lok Seoi Gumshoes
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.

card.name: Haak Faa & Baak Syut
card.text: When Haak Faa & Baak Syut enters, search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. [0]: Put a loyalty counter on Haak Faa & Baak Syut for each Equipment attached to them. [-3]: Whenever Haak Faa & Baak Syut attacks this turn, for each Equipment attached to them, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token that's tapped and attacking and a token that's a copy of that equipment attached to that Spirit.

card.name: Hauntroom Consultant
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Disparage
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Decoy Doll
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, choose another attacking creature you control. Only one of those two creatures can be blocked this turn. When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: Kaigun Quarter Guide
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Wire Bodhisattva
card.text: Casting spells and permanents entering don't cause abilities to trigger.

card.name: Naau Gok Carver
card.text: Haste {1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Slacking Sergeant
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, up to two target creatures each get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Your Thousand Eyes See All
card.text: Surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Beseech {3}{U}{U} ({3}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Relaxed Rookies
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Impromptu Exorcism
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Destroy target token. Draw a card.

card.name: Frostwhip Siu Tse
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") {1}{W}, {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: Dark Alley Occultist
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") {2}{B}: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: She Hides Between Moments
card.text: Copy up to one target spell or nonland permanent. You may choose new targets for the copies. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.) Beseech {4}{U}{U} ({4}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Heung Street Tagger
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) When this creature enters, distribute two +1/+1 counters among target creatures you control. If you have the city's blessing, distribute three +1/+1 counters instead.

card.name: Her Gaze Pierces All Veils
card.text: Each opponent discards a card. Beseech {4}{B} ({4}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Constrain
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. {3}{U}: Shuffle enchanted creature into its owner's library. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lowrise Line Cook
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 1 life. {W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 green Citizen creature token.

card.name: Midtower Lookout
card.text: Vigilance This creature gets +1/+1 if you control an artifact and an enchantment.

card.name: Salaried Seraph
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Flying As long as you have the city's blessing, this creature gets +2/+0.

card.name: Determined Vigilante
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {3}{W}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. It can't block this turn. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Seraphic Bloodwing
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may activate one of its nonmana abilities without paying the cost. {2}{W}, Discard this card: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two other target creatures.

card.name: Clanging Steel
card.text: This spell deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. Dynamic — If you attacked with exactly two creatures or activated two or more nonmana abilities this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Nowhere Trip
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. {1}{W}, Sacrifice this enchantment: You gain 2 life.

card.name: Eightwind Nineshield
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.")

card.name: Purple Line Whispermonger
card.text: When this creature dies, you may activate one of its nonmana abilities without paying the cost. {5}{U}: Draw a card.

card.name: Elevator Octopus Girl
card.text: Nonmana abilities of cards you own cost {1} less for you to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {7}{U}: This creature gets +8/+8 until end of turn.

card.name: Peephole Peekers
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) You may look at an additional card whenever you surveil.

card.name: Mobile Monitor
card.text: Defender When this creature enters, surveil 2. {3}{U}: This creature can attack as though it didn't have defender this turn.

card.name: Constructed Cetacean
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control an artifact. This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control an enchantment. {1}{U}: This creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Moongorger
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, if you cast it, draw a card. {4}{U}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. It can't block this turn. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Pocketshine
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell that targets you or a permanent you control. • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Reflection
card.text: Draw two cards. {1}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Lost in the Crowd
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Kaigun Quarter Hotshot
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, this creature deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Redgate Ringer
card.text: When this creature enters, you may activate one of its nonmana abilities without paying the cost. {5}{R}: Mill a card. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Tetrad Capo
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, mill a card. You may play it until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Kaigun Infantry Veteran
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may activate one of its nonmana abilities without paying the cost. {1}{R}: Target creature gains first strike until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Melting Grimace
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if one or more cards left your graveyard this turn. Menace

card.name: Collapse

card.name: Its Fangs Are Sharp as Knives

Beseech {4}{W}{W} ({4}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. card.name: Haak Gaai Dealer
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) When this creature enters, surveil 1. Then if you have the city's blessing, draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Energy Drainer
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card. Whenever you spend four or more mana to cast a noncreature spell or activate a nonmana ability, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Ragged Beat Cop
card.text: When this creature enters, you may pay 2 life. If you do, or if you control a Horror, draw a card.

card.name: Shadow of Woe
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Whenever a Horror creature you control enters, each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Tetrad Shotcaller
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Whenever a creature you control dies, if you have the city's blessing, each opponent loses 1 life. When this creature enters, create two 1/1 black Rogue creature tokens with "When this creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life."

card.name: Crawling Shadow
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each token you control. Menace {1}{B}, Sacrifice this creature: Create two 4/3 colorless Horror creature tokens. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Gutsy Student
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, you gain 2 life. {2}{G}: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Lou Waan Curio Dealer
card.text: When this creature enters, if you created a token this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. {3}{G}: Return this creature to its owner's hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.text: Trample {T}: Add {G}. If you control another Horror, add {G}{G} instead.

card.name: Work Horse

card.name: Lou Waan Vigilante

card.name: Tetrad's Hammer
card.text: Trample Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, other creatures you control gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Steelheight Horror
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each token you control. Reach This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Lost Technique Punch

card.name: Skyscrape
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn. If you have the city's blessing, that creature gets +4/+4 and gains reach until end of turn instead.

card.name: Neon Gaze
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Search your library for a basic land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped. If you have the city's blessing, untap that land. It gets "{T}: Add one mana of any color." until end of turn.

card.name: Mimic
card.text: {T}: Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. {2}: This artifact becomes a Shapeshifter artifact creature with base power and toughness 3/3 until end of turn.

card.name: Futuristic Hoverbike
card.text: Flying Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.) {2}, Discard this card or sacrifice this Vehicle: Surveil 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Mark of Good Fortune
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand. {8}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards. You gain 8 life.

card.name: Derelicts Denizen
card.text: When this card leaves your graveyard, you may shuffle it into your library. If you do, you gain 2 life. {W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Light Before Dawn
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you gain 3 life. {2}{W}: Two target creatures you control each gain vigilance until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lau Waan Exorsister
card.text: First strike against Vampires, Werewolves, Zombies, Horrors and Spirits. When this creature enters, up to one target enchantment loses all abilities and becomes a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature.

card.name: Vigilant Veterans
card.text: Vigilance Other Detectives you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance.

card.name: After Crew
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Shrineguard Lion
card.text: As long as you control an artifact, this creature gets +1/+0. As long as you control an enchantment, this creature gets +1/+0.

card.name: Jiangshi Throng
card.text: When this creature enters, if you cast it, you may activate one of its nonmana abilities without paying the cost. {2}{W}: Search your library for a card named Jiangshi Throng, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. That creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Obviate
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Exile target creature if it has mana value 1 or less or if you have the city's blessing.

card.name: Scrapbeak
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw a card. {2}{U}: Another target creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Yih Wu Fiddler
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, choose one — • You may tap an untapped creature you control. If you do, draw a card. • Tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Next Century Anxiety
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature enters or attacks, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) This creature gets +1/+1 for each card you looked at while surveiling this turn.

card.text: When this creature enters, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. As long as you control this creature, you may play a copy of that card. (A copy of a permanent card enters as a token.)

card.name: Grace Me With Your Presence

card.name: Red Pocket Delivery
card.text: Look at the top eight cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Ming Yue's Lucky Tile

card.name: Neighbourhood Loop Bus

card.name: Tower Block Goliath
card.text: Reach, trample When this creature enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Obscene Mass
card.text: Trample {1}{B}, Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If the sacrificed permanent was a Horror, put X +1/+1 counters on this creature instead, where X is the sacrificed Horror's power. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Duress
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Smoke From Rubble
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each opponent discards two cards. {2}{B}: Target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn. Another target creature you control gains menace until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Hero's Downfall
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Id Drain
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. If you don't control a Horror, discard a card.

card.name: Disvertebrate
card.text: Target creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn. At the beginning of the next end step, you lose 2 life unless you pay {1}.

card.text: When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to up to one target creature. {3}{R}{R}: This creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Bloodnote Belcher

card.name: Maw of the Pious

card.name: Hung Gaai Rumourmonger

card.name: Wind-up Jiangshi
card.text: Haste At the beginning of your upkeep, tap this creature unless you pay {C}. When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.")

card.name: Filmsnap Addict
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Not My Monkeys
card.text: Create three 1/1 red Monkey tokens with menace and reach. You may sacrifice three nonland permanents. If you do, create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token.

card.name: Fire in the Hole
card.text: When this enchantment enters, it deals 3 damage to up to one target. {1}{R}: Two target creatures you control each get +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Oukijo's Design
card.text: Gain control of all creatures until end of turn.

card.name: Act on Rumour
card.text: Mill three cards. You may play those cards until your next end step. At the beginning of your next end step, for each card you didn't play this way, shuffle it into your library. That card deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Two-headed Crawler
card.text: Double strike {2}{R}, Discard this card: Target creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Precinct Eight Muscle
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, this creature gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Fwun Sah Eccentric
card.text: When this creature enters, you may activate one of its nonmana abilities without paying the cost. {3}{G}{G}: Mill three cards. You may put a permanent card from among the cards milled this way into your hand. If you don't, return a land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Curiosity Cabineteer
card.text: Whenever you create a token, if it doesn't share a name with another permanent you control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {3}, Sacrifice a token: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lost Hatchling
card.text: Whenever you spend four or more mana to cast a noncreature spell or activate a nonmana ability, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {3}{R}: This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Boomcase Trooper
card.text: Vigilance, reach When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 on target creature. {2}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature without a counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Roots Among People
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of two target creatures you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Collected Casting
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Reveal up to two cards with activated abilities. For each of those cards, put it onto the battlefield tapped if it's a permanent with mana value 3 or less. Otherwise, put that card into your hand. Shuffle the rest onto the bottom of your library.

card.name: Street Food Break
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control. You gain 2 life. {1}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control. You gain 1 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: A Small Gesture
card.text: Choose one — • Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. • Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn.

card.name: Curious Pair
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, search your library for an artifact or enchantment card, reveal it and shuffle. Put that card onto the battlefield if its mana value is 2 or less. Otherwise, put it into your hand.

card.name: Rubberneck Lookout
card.text: When this creature enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) During your turn, this creature gets +1/+0 for each card you looked at while surveiling this turn.

card.name: Copper Street Ruffian
card.text: Creatures you control without menace can't be blocked by more than one creature. Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, this creature and up to one other target creature each get +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Kaigun Quarter Everyman
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, you gain 1 life. When this creature enters or dies, create a 1/1 green Citizen creature token with "When this creature enters, you gain 1 life."

card.name: Tiger Mother
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 green Citizen creature tokens with "When this creature enters, you gain 1 life." At the beginning of your combat, you may pay 1 life. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature.

card.name: Skyline Exorcist
card.text: Nonmana abilities of other cards you own cost {1} less for you to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {3}{U}{R}: This creature deals 2 damage to any noncreature target.

card.name: Sluice Slinker
card.text: Menace {3}{B}{G}, Sacrifice this creature: Create two 4/3 colorless Horror creature tokens. They can't block this turn.

card.name: Softear Restauranteur
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, shuffle up to one target card from your graveyard into your library. During your turn, this creature gets +1/+0 for each card that left your graveyard this turn.

card.name: Ambitious Ancestseer
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") Talismans you control have "{1}, {T}: Add {G}{U}."

card.name: Precinct Eight Deskjockey
card.text: When this creature enters, you may activate one of its nonmana abilities without paying the cost. {1}{WU}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card unless you control an artifact and an enchantment.

card.name: Invisible Skulker
card.text: Whenever you surveil, this creature can't be blocked until end of turn. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a noncreature permanent or player, draw a card.

card.name: Dragoncloak Scoundrel
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, if you spent four or more mana to cast a noncreature spell or activate a nonmana ability this turn, draw a card. {3}{BR}: If this creature isn't attacking, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Citysight Guide
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may tap any number of untapped tokens you control. This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each token tapped this way. {3}{G}{W}: Create a 1/1 green Citizen creature token with "When this creature enters, you gain 1 life."

card.name: Ambitious Phlebotomist
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) As long as you have the city's blessing, this creature has flying and lifelink. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a noncreature permanent or player, you may pay 2 life. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Purple Line Arcanist
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, mill a card. You may play that card this turn. It costs {1} less to cast for each nonmana ability you activated this turn.

card.name: Derelicts Hexapod
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Horror you control. Trample Other Horrors you control have trample.

card.name: Cha Siu Street Butcher
card.text: Lifelink Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, this creature deals that much damage to up to one target player.

card.name: Dreambreacher
card.text: Flying, trample When this creature enters, choose one — • You may play an additional land this turn. • Draw a card. {G}{U}: Put this card from your hand onto the battlefield, then exile it. You may cast it from exile on a later turn.

card.name: Warped Cityscape
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, Discard this card or sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Skyward Vista
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {C}{C}. Activate only if you have the city's blessing.

card.name: Arcade Crane Game
card.text: {2}, {T}, Tap an untapped non-Toy creature you control: Create a 1/1 colorless Toy artifact creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ambulating Apartment
card.text: Reach When this creature dies, create two 1/1 green Citizen creature tokens with "When this creature enters, you gain 1 life."

card.name: Rubbersludge Cab
card.text: Haste Whenever this Vehicle attacks, mill a card. You may play it until end of turn. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Paper Dragon
card.text: Flying {2}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability costs {1} more to activate for each +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Backalley Juicesuit
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) Equipped creature gets +3/+3 and has menace. Equip {2}. This ability costs {2} less to activate if this Equipment entered this turn.

card.name: Ancestral Altar
card.text: Cards in your graveyard have hexproof. {3}: You gain 1 life for each Shrine you control.

card.name: Coinball
card.text: {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. Activate only if this artifact entered this turn. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Sunset Classroom
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. You can't spend this mana to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Midnight Nook
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. You can't spend this mana to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Deepstar Generator
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. You can't spend this mana to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Twilight Canteen
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. You can't spend this mana to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Daybreak Platform
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. You can't spend this mana to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Casting Call
card.text: Look at the top seven cards of your library. You may reveal a legendary or Plains card from among them and put it into your hand. Shuffle the rest onto the bottom of your library.

card.name: Regret of a Long-Gone Girl
card.text: Flash If a creature not named Regret of a Long-Gone Girl you control would die, exile it instead. When this creature dies, return each creature card exiled with it to the battlefield.

card.name: Under the Spotlight
card.text: Flash Creatures your opponents control lose hexproof and can't have or gain hexproof. {1}{U}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Hallowed Be Thy Touch
card.text: Up to one target creature gets +4/+4 and gains flying and vigilance until end of turn. If you cast this spell from anywhere other than your hand, instead put four +1/+1 counters, a flying counter and a vigilance counter on that creature. Beseech {5}{W}{W} ({5}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Waan Tin Soothsayer
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") {1}, {T}: Choose a creature type. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to target creature by creatures of the chosen type until end of turn.

card.name: Clearsky Aspirant
card.text: Exhaust — {W}: Put a +1/+1 counter and a vigilance counter on this creature. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.) Exhaust — {2}{W}: Put two +1/+1 counters and a lifelink counter on this creature. Exhaust — {4}{W}: Put three +1/+1 counters and a flying counter on this creature.

card.name: Melanchozoa
card.text: Flying, hexproof When this creature enters, draw a card. When this creature leaves the battlefield, shuffle it into its owner's library.

card.name: Tsoi Jam Mei Loi
card.text: Flash When Tsoi Jam Mei Loi enters, exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. You may cast it for as long as it remains exiled. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on Tsoi Jam Mei Loi.

card.name: Your Ancient Grasp Holds All
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one. Beseech {7}{U}{U}{U} ({7}{U}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Spin Cycle
card.text: Choose one — • Target player draws a card. • Target player mills four cards. • Target player shuffles their graveyard into their library.

card.name: Follow the Crowd
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Gain control of target creature if its power is less than or equal to the number of nonland permanents you control or if you have the city's blessing.

card.name: Villainous Endgame
card.text: Destroy all creatures. For each creature destroyed this way, its controller draws a card and you add {B}.

card.name: Walking Singularity
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each spell named Walking Singularity you cast this game. (Including this one.) {1}{B}, Sacrifice this creature: Exile target creature or enchantment with mana value equal or less than this creature's power.

card.name: Creeping Darkness
card.text: At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, they sacrifice a creature. If they can't, they sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they can't, they discard a card. If they can't, they lose 4 life.

card.name: Omnicidal Teen
card.text: Haste, deathtouch Creatures you don't control have "This creature must block Omnicidal Teen if able."

card.name: Shatter Soul
card.text: Destroy target creature. If that creature dies this way, its controller creates two tokens that are copies of that creature, except they're 1/1.

card.name: Apex Terror
card.text: Trample You can't cast spells from your hand. Whenever this creature attacks, discard a card. If you do, put +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you can't, tap this creature.

card.name: Hei Foon Nei
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Whenever Hei Foon Nei attacks, if you have the city's blessing, you may activate one of her nonmana abilities without paying the cost. {1}{R}, Discard a card: Mill a card. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Tetrad Kingpin
card.text: This spell has "Ward—Pay 2 life." Ward—Pay 2 life Other spells and creatures you control have "Ward—Pay 2 life."

card.name: Lavabat Hooligan
card.text: Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, this creature gets +1/+0 for each creature you control that's not attacking until end of turn. Discard a card: Draw a card. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Aria of Blood
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each opponent gains 8 life. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a viscera counter on this enchantment. At the beginning of your end step, this enchantment deals X damage to any target, where X is the number of viscera counters on it.

card.name: Kanpai!
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Untap target creature that attacked this turn. If you have the city's blessing, untap all creatures you control instead. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase. You get the city's blessing until end of turn.

card.name: Luk Gaai Ancestseer
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") {2}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it's a permanent card you own, you may play a copy of that card until end of turn. (A copy of a permanent card enters as a token.)

card.name: Its Coil Tightens Inexorably
card.text: Put X +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature. Beseech {X}{G}{G}{G} ({X}{G}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Zodiac Throng
card.text: This creature is also a Rat, Ox, Cat, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Bird, Dog and Boar. Trample {2W}{2U}{2B}{2R}{2G}: Create a token that's a copy of this creature.

card.name: Ursa Major
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature attacks, destroy up to one target noncreature permanent. When this creature dies, create three 2/2 green Bear creature tokens.

card.name: Traditionalist Ancestseer
card.text: Whenever this creature or a basic land you control enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") {3}{G}: Target land you control becomes a 3/3 creature that's still a land with haste and "When this creature leaves the battlefield, return it to the battlefield tapped." Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mirrored Past
card.text: Whenever you play a land from your graveyard, copy it. Whenever you cast a spell from your graveyard, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. Whenever you activate a nonmana ability of a card in your graveyard, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Rubbertorch Motorist
card.text: Haste Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonmana ability each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Sacrifice a land: Search your library for a basic land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Smith & Nguyen
card.text: When Smith & Nguyen enter, choose another nonland card name. Spells with the chosen name can't be cast. [+1]: Smith & Nguyen gain vigilance until end of turn. [-2]: Draw a card.

card.name: Laai Ban Jyu & Mystery Girl
card.text: Vigilance, menace [+1]: Exile up to one target card from your graveyard. If a permanent card was exiled this way, put a +1/+1 counter on Laai Ban Jyu & Mystery Girl. [-2]: You may cast an instant or sorcery card from among cards exiled with Laai Ban Jyu & Mystery Girl until end of turn.

card.name: Siu Coeng & Daai Paau
card.text: [+1]: Up to one target creature gains trample and haste until end of turn. [-2]: Siu Coeng & Daai Paau deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Hung Sin & Laam Jyut
card.text: You may activate Hung Sin & Laam Jyut's loyalty abilities an additional time each turn. [+1]: Tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. [-X]: Gain control of target creature with mana value X until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Siu Bau & Friendly Jiangshi
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a Food, put a loyalty counter on Siu Bau & Friendly Jiangshi. They get +1/+1 until end of turn. [+1]: Create a Food token. [-2]: Each opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: Dai Tse & Siu Mui
card.text: Lifelink [+1]: Up to one target creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control. [-1]: Create a 1/1 black Rogue creature token with "When this creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life."

card.name: Mildred & Teresa
card.text: Whenever you put a lore counter on another permanent you control, put two loyalty counters on Mildred & Teresa. [-X]: You may cast target Saga card with mana value X or less from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it.

card.name: Omnicephalys
card.text: When this creature enters, you may activate one of its activated abilities without paying the cost. {3}{U}: This creature becomes a copy of target creature, except it's a Shapeshifter Horror in addition to its other types and has this ability.

card.name: Fatal Finale
card.text: You may activate one of target permanent's nonmana abilities without paying its cost. Sacrifice that permanent at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Fangcurl Denizen
card.text: First strike, deathtouch Whenever this creature attacks, put a growth counter on this creature, then create X 1/1 red and green Snake creature tokens with first strike that are tapped and attacking, where X is the number of growth counters on this creature. Sacrifice each token created this way at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Amateur Threadseeker
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") Talismans you control have "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card."

card.name: Urban Labyrinth
card.text: Creatures with power greater than the number of nonland permanents its controller controls can't attack. At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player exiles a nonland permanent until this artifact leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Return of the Ninth Dragon
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Choose one. If you have the city's blessing, you may choose both instead. • Search your library and/or outside of the game for a Dragon card, reveal it and put it into your hand or graveyard. • Return a creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Friend of the Departed
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, you may exile it. If you do, this creature gains all nonmana activated abilities of that card until you exile another card with this creature.

card.name: Streetlight Psychosis
card.text: Whenever you lose unspent mana, add that much {C} at the beginning of the next step. {99}: This enchantment becomes a 99/99 Avatar creature with trample, hexproof and indestructible in addition to its other types.

card.name: Decorated Constable
card.text: First strike Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Whenever you create a token, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If you have the city's blessing, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature instead.

card.name: Reader and Weeper
card.text: As this creature enters, choose one. • Thirteen Orphans — At the beginning of your upkeep, if there are thirteen or more unique names among other permanents you control, you win the game. • Great Dragons — At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control four or more dragons with power 4 or greater, you win the game.

card.name: Sidestreet Sucker
card.text: Whenever you draw a card, if this creature has power 7 or less, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {7}{U}: Draw a card. Activate only once each turn. This ability costs {1} less for each +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Zenith of Exuberance
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a nonland permanent. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland permanent card. Put that card onto the battlefield if its mana value is less than or equal to the mana value of the sacrificed permanent or if you have the city's blessing, then shuffle.

card.name: Qiangliang
card.text: Flash Lifelink Whenever Qiangliang enters or attacks, up to one other target creature gains hexproof and indestructible until your next turn.

card.name: Shadow of the Ninth Dragon
card.text: Flying, lifelink, menace When Shadow of the Ninth Dragon enters, mill three cards. You may put a permanent card from among the cards milled this way into your hand. {1}{B}{G}: Put this card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield, then sacrifice it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Hal Sa-yi the Brightedge
card.text: First strike Prevent all damage that would be dealt to Hal Sa-yi by sources without first or double strike. Whenever Hal Sa-yi attacks, reveal the top two cards of your library. Put one into your graveyard. You gain life equal to its mana value. Put the other into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Lily An, Exorcist Extraordinare
card.text: Haste, deathtouch against Horrors (Any amount of damage this deals to a Horror is enough to destroy it.) When Lily An enters, you may pay {R}. If you do, she deals 1 damage to any target. {1}{G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. Put a +1/+1 counter on Lily An.

card.name: Special Agent Ming Yue
card.text: Flash When Ming Yue enters, if you cast her, exile up to one target spell or nonland permanent. For as long as that card remains exiled, its owner may play it. A spell cast by an opponent this way costs {2} more to cast.

card.name: Botched Job
card.text: Destroy target creature. Dynamic — If you attacked with exactly two creatures or activated two or more nonmana abilities this turn, that creature's controller loses 2 life.

card.name: Its Thirst is Unquenchable
card.text: Up to one target creature gets +1/+0 and gains haste and trample until end of turn. Beseech {4}{R}{R} ({4}{R}{R}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Stop
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell. • Counter target spell that wasn't cast from its owner's hand. Draw a card. • Counter target activated or triggered ability. Draw a card.

card.name: Their Eons Ought Be Forgotten
card.text: Each opponent sacrifices a land and discards two cards. Beseech {5}{B}{B}{R}{R} ({5}{B}{B}{R}{R}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Spiritual Dispute
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Draw two cards and create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.")

card.name: Feathers Above
card.text: When this enchantment enters, surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {1}{U}: Two target creatures you control each gain flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Rumour Milling
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a card from it. That player exiles that card. {2}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. Activate only if you control a Horror.

card.name: Ghost Chit Ignition
card.text: This spell deals 3 damage to any target. Create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.")

card.name: Rainy Alley Devil
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control another Horror. {4}{G}: Target Horror you control gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Flametend
card.text: Mill two cards. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. Create a Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.")

card.name: Eighty Thousand Point Gamble
card.text: When this enchantment enters, if you cast it, discard your hand. If you do, draw eight cards at the beginning of your next upkeep. Skip your draw step. This enchantment can't be sacrificed.

card.name: Daring Acrobatics
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. As long as you have the city's blessing, you may cast this card from your graveyard.

card.name: Motorized Private Eye
card.text: Vigilance This creature gets +2/+0 if you've surveiled this turn.

card.name: Your Hunger Growls Echo
card.text: You gain 5 life. Beseech {6}{G} ({6}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. Then cast a copy of this card without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Tetrad's Fist
card.text: When this creature enters, it fights up to one other target creature. {1}{G}, Discard this card or sacrifice this creature: Destroy target enchantment or artifact. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: The Girl Who Literally Blew Up
Tetrad Tactics
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Create a 1/1 black Rogue creature token with "When this creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life."

card.name: Talisman TOTL
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Tetrad Newblood
card.text: Menace Whenever you spend four or more mana to cast a noncreature spell or activate a nonmana ability, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Hirsute Haymaker
card.text: Dynamic — If you attacked with exactly two creatures or activated two or more nonmana abilities this turn, target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Then it deals damage equal to its power to up to one other target creature.

card.name: Tetrad Hooligan
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 4 life. Dynamic — Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures or activate your second nonamana ability each turn, up to two target creatures each get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: The Girl Who Ate an Angel
Ancestral Blessing
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has flying. {G}, Reveal this card from your hand: Create a 1/1 green Citizen creature token with "When this creature enters, you gain 1 life." Activate only as a sorcery and only once.

card.name: Fwun Sha Drycleaner
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may exile up to one target card from a graveyard. If it's a card you own, you may shuffle it into your library. Whenever a card leaves your graveyard during your turn, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Garrotte
card.text: This spell deals 3 damage to target creature. {4}{R}{R}, Discard this card: This card deals 2 damage to each opponent and each creature you don't control.

card.name: Akane & Kurone
card.text: [+1]: You may pay 3 life. If you do, put a loyalty counter on Akane & Kurone. Repeat this process with discarding a card and sacrificing a nonland permanent. [-2]: Each opponent loses 3 life, discards a card and sacrifices a nonland permanent.

card.name: Qiao Xian & Qiao Hou
card.text: Whenever Qiao Xian & Qiao Hou attack, draw a card if you gained life this turn. Then you gain 2 life. [+1]: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. [-1]: Put a +1/+1 counter on two target creatures you control.

card.name: Exorcist's Judgement
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice an artifact or enchantment. If you do, choose two. Otherwise, choose one. • Counter target spell. • Draw a card. • Target player gains 4 life.

card.name: Shopping Spree
card.text: Mill three cards. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. Create three tapped Talisman tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.")

card.name: The Student Who Touched A Cloud
Cramped Archive
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, Sacrifice this land or discard this card: Draw a card and create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.")

card.name: Tetragram Tracer
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add two mana of any one color. {5}: Target nonland permanent you control becomes a 5/5 colorless Spirit creature until end of turn. Spend only mana of the same color to activate this ability. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Rumour Eater
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy up to three target artifacts and/or enchantments with total mana value 3 or less. {1}, Sacrifice an artifact or enchantment: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability costs {1} more to activate for each +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Joss Twig Tender
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Talisman token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") {2}{B}{R}: Target creature that's not attacking gains menace and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: The Sailor Who Tamed A Shark
The Warrior Maids of Haute Manor
Trawl the Resonet
card.text: Draw a card. {U}, Remove a lore counter from a permanent you control, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Maan Tsau Beholder
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card you looked at while surveiling this turn. {7}{U}: Create a 4/3 colorless Horror creature token. It can't block this turn. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each card you looked at while surveiling this turn.

card.name: Blightrazer
card.text: When this creature enters, each other creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Fu Luk Hoarder
card.text: When this creature enters, create two tapped Talisman tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand.") Talismans you control have "{T}: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Activate only once each turn."

card.name: Floating Voidjaw
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, you gain 2 life. Whenever this creature attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Highrise Hustler
card.text: Whenever you activate a nonmana ability, this creature gains flying until end of turn if it's the first time this ability has resolved this turn. If it's the second time, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If it's the third time, draw a card.

card.name: Golden Revolver
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, it deals 3 damage to up to one target attacking or blocking creature. Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2}.

card.name: Copper Street Ride or Die
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks with exactly one other creature, put a +1/+1 counter on each of those creatures. When this creature dies, put its counters on up to one target creature.

card.name: The Fisher Who Caught A Kraken
!Draft
card.text: {W}{U}: Have artifact and enchantment {U}{B}: Surveil {B}{R}: Spend four+ mana {R}{G}: Pair attack {G}{W}: Tokens/wide {W}{B}: Ascend {B}{G}: Horrors {G}{U}: Ramp {U}{R}: Activated abilities {R}{W}: Cards leaving graveyard

card.name: !Place Names
card.text: {W}{B}: Grey line {B}{G}: Brown line {G}{U}: Yellow line {R}{W}: Orange line {U}{R}: Purple line
